description: Determine the best imagery source for beautiful high-quality Mars surface rendering and acquire/verify access. Candidates: (1) Casey Handmer R2 tiles already partially integrated at pub-3c6ee3900f804513bd3b2a3e4df337bd.r2.dev — verify tile URL structure, LOD coverage, and completeness; (2) OPM XYZ tiles (Viking MDIM 2.1, OPM Mars Basemap v0.2) — free, public, no auth; (3) Murray Lab CTX raw GeoTIFFs — ~5.6 TB, would need self-hosting pipeline (likely impractical). IMPORTANT: Do NOT download raw Murray Lab GeoTIFFs without confirming a tile-serving plan first — the full dataset is too large to naively self-host. Goal: identify which source gives best visual quality at full LOD range, confirm access, and document the tile URL pattern and Cesium provider type. Deliverable is a documented decision + working tile URL, not necessarily a download. Must complete before RP-4 (arch refactor) and RP-7 (imagery layer) are finalized.
title: Research + acquire high-quality Mars surface imagery tiles
